data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Auditability of tier at time of access', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or validations that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The prior steps do not demonstrate any API reads or persisted state checks related to the auditability of membership tiers, indicating a clear gap in the evidence. Specifically, there is no evidence of how the system tracks or verifies the membership tier at the time of access, which is critical for auditability.
gaps: No evidence of auditability checks for membership tier at time of access.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
